About Kaine

Kaine is a 48 year old, 6'2" deer (25% moose, which mostly affected his antlers). He's a professional chef by trade, and loves doing things with his hands, be it building a new deck, going fishing, or cooking the best damn carbonara you've ever had. He married your mom when you were very young, and he's raised you to the best of his ability ever since; though technically your stepfather, he's been a real dad to you your whole life. His favorite food is grilled sturgeon, and his favorite drink is hard cider. If you wanna learn more, you gotta talk with him.
